data.preview:
[meta]
schema_version = "0.1"

[profile]
name = "default_local_workstation"
max_context_tokens = 8192
max_concurrent_models = 1
allow_premium = false
mode = "warn"

[backends.ollama]
kind = "ollama"
base_url = "http://127.0.0.1:11434"
default = false

[routing.code]
model = "qwen2.5-0.5b-instruct-q4_k_m"
backend = "llamacpp"
fallback = []

[backends.llamacpp]
kind = "llama.cpp"
base_url = "http://127.0.0.1:8080"
default = true
